- Plan: Test movement to see if the white shape moves with arrow keys.

sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: Let me check what changed after pressing RIGHT. I need to compare the previous frame to the current frame to see if the white shape moved.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Compare before and after to see what changed
before_seg = previous_frame.segmentation
after_seg = current_frame.segmentation

print("=== Before RIGHT ===")
for n in before_seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] != 'S':  # skip background
        print(f"  id={n['id']}, color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary'][:4]}")

print("\n=== After RIGHT ===")
for n in after_seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] != 'S':
        print(f"  id={n['id']}, color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary'][:4]}")

# Check if white shape moved
before_white = [n for n in before_seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'W'][0]
after_white = [n for n in after_seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'W'][0]
print(f"\nWhite before boundary: {before_white['boundary']}")
print(f"White after boundary: {after_white['boundary']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
The white shape moved 3 columns to the right (from col 11 to col 14). The red blocks below it (nodes 3 and 4) also moved 3 columns right. The green shape and its red blocks stayed in place.
So the white shape + its two red blocks move together as a group when I press RIGHT. Each press moves the group 3 columns right.
Now I need to figure out the goal. The green frame is at cols 41-49. The white shape is currently at cols 14-28. I need to move the white shape toward the green frame.
Let me also check if the top charcoal bar changed (it might be a step counter or timer).
Let me try to move the white shape all the way to the green frame. The green frame starts at col 41, and the white shape is at col 14. The gap is about 27 columns, and each RIGHT moves 3 columns, so I'd need about 9 more RIGHT presses.
But wait - let me first understand what the goal is. Maybe I need to move the white shape INTO the green frame. Let me try more movement.

sections.label: ASSISTANT
sections.content:
World model updated: RIGHT moves the white shape + its two red blocks 3 columns right. The green frame and its red blocks are stationary. Each arrow key press moves the player group by 3 cells.
Plan: Navigate the white shape to the green frame. Need to move right and down. Let me test all directions first, then plan a path.
